narrative: Surface-water community PWS serving 8,500 customers. E. coli: not detected. Nitrate: 1.2 mg/L (below MCL of 10). Lead 90th-percentile: 6 µg/L (below AL trigger). Lead-service-line inventory published Sept 2024, covers full distribution. AWIA RRA + ERP recertified 2.1 years ago. SCADA: default credentials changed; MFA on remote access; OT-IT segmented. Consumer Confidence Report published June 15. TTHM 42 µg/L, HAA5 28 µg/L (both below MCL). Filtration turbidity 95th-percentile 0.18 NTU. All quarterly monitoring completed.
